message:
ci: improve GitHub Actions workflows with caching and best practices

This commit applies several best practices improvements to all workflow files:

ci.yml:
- Add concurrency control to cancel redundant runs on non-main branches
- Update Bun version from 1.1.38 to 1.2.4
- Add Bun dependency caching (~/.bun/install/cache) to all jobs
- Fix misleading job name to "Lint, Typecheck & Test" (was "Lint & Typecheck" but also ran tests)

annotate-phages.yml:
- Add concurrency control (cancel-in-progress: false for long-running jobs)
- Pin Bun version instead of using "latest" for reproducibility
- Update Python version from 3.11 to 3.12
- Add Bun dependency caching
- Use --frozen-lockfile for consistent installs

e2e-production.yml:
- Add concurrency control per deployment environment
- Pin Bun version instead of using "latest"
- Add Bun dependency caching
- Add Playwright browser caching with proper cache-hit handling
- Remove unused webkit browser (tests only use chromium)
- Split browser install vs deps install based on cache state

lighthouse.yml:
- Add concurrency control
- Update Bun version
- Add Bun dependency caching
- Replace npm global install with bunx for consistency
- Update lighthouse CLI from 0.13.x to 0.14.x
- Upload Lighthouse results as artifacts for debugging
- Use proper working-directory instead of cd commands

These changes improve CI performance through caching, ensure
reproducible builds with pinned versions, and follow GitHub
Actions best practices for concurrency control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,13 @@ on:
         default: '0'
         type: string
 
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false  # Don't cancel long-running annotation jobs
+
+env:
+  BUN_VERSION: "1.2.4"
+
 jobs:
   annotate:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -41,21 +48,29 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
-          bun-version: latest
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Setup Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: '3.11'
+          python-version: '3.12'
           cache: 'pip'
           cache-dependency-path: scripts/annotation/requirements.txt
 
       - name: Install Python dependencies
         run: |
           pip install -r scripts/annotation/requirements.txt
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lockb') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install Node dependencies
-        run: bun install
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Build data pipeline
         run: bun run build --filter=@phage-explorer/data-pipeline

@@ -8,15 +8,19 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' }}
+
 env:
-  BUN_VERSION: "1.1.38"
+  BUN_VERSION: "1.2.4"
 
 jobs:
   # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
-  # Lint and Type Check
+  # Lint, Type Check, and Test
   # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   check:
-    name: Lint & Typecheck
+    name: Lint, Typecheck & Test
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -26,6 +30,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lockb') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
@@ -64,6 +76,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lockb') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
@@ -123,6 +143,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lockb') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile

@@ -13,7 +13,12 @@ on:
         required: false
         default: 'https://phage-explorer.org'
 
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.event.deployment.environment || 'manual' }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
 env:
+  BUN_VERSION: "1.2.4"
   PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL: ${{ github.event.inputs.site_url || 'https://phage-explorer.org' }}
 
 jobs:
@@ -42,13 +47,35 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
-          bun-version: latest
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lockb') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
+      - name: Cache Playwright browsers
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        id: playwright-cache
+        with:
+          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lockb') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-
+
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium webkit
+        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium
+
+      - name: Install Playwright system dependencies
+        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true'
+        run: bunx playwright install-deps chromium
 
       - name: Wait for site to be ready
         run: |

@@ -6,8 +6,12 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
 
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' }}
+
 env:
-  BUN_VERSION: "1.1.38"
+  BUN_VERSION: "1.2.4"
 
 jobs:
   lighthouse:
@@ -21,14 +25,29 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
 
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-bun-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lockb') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-bun-
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Build Web App
-        run: cd packages/web && bun run build
+        run: bun run --cwd packages/web build
 
       - name: Run Lighthouse CI
         run: |
-          npm install -g @lhci/cli@0.13.x
-          cd packages/web
-          lhci autorun
+          bunx @lhci/cli@0.14.x autorun
+        working-directory: packages/web
+
+      - name: Upload Lighthouse results
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          name: lighthouse-results
+          path: packages/web/.lighthouseci/
+          retention-days: 14
